content:
Clean Energy in Enterprise Tech

Today, Aoura Group has entered into a strategic energy alliance with Tesla to deploy utility-scale energy storage systems at all active data centers worldwide. This alliance aligns with Aoura Group's sustainability initiative to run 100% net-zero carbon operations by 2030.

"Partnering with Tesla allows us to build reliable, grid-independent energy solutions that ensure 99.999% uptime for our cloud clients."

Implementation & Storage Capacity

Tesla will deploy Megapack storage units totaling 1.2 Gigawatt-hours (GWh) of capacity. The installation will support:

  • Peak-load shaving during high-demand utility hours.
  • Seamless backup battery systems replacing diesel generators.
  • Integration with local wind and solar energy grids.

Phased Global Rollout

Phase 1 installation begins in Ireland and Oregon data facilities during Q3 2026. Phase 2 will expand to Tokyo, Frankfurt, and Singapore data operations through late 2027.
